nasb.text: For You, O Lord, have made me glad by what You have done, I will sing for joy at the works of Your hands.

esv.text: For you, O Lord, have made me glad by your work; at the works of your hands I sing for joy.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！你藉著你的作為使我歡喜， 我要因你手的工作歡呼。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你的作为使我快乐， 我要颂扬你手所做的工。

csbs.text: 因为耶和华啊，你藉着你的作为使我欢喜， 我要因你手所做的而欢呼！
